research.status_summary: Actively growing and hiring — Briya is scaling its U.S. presence post-Series A, adding senior leadership and open technical/design roles as of mid-2026.
research.hiring_policy: Open roles include Data Engineer and Product Designer, listed on briya.com/careers with no explicit mention of visa sponsorship or remote policy; company operates offices in Israel (Tel Aviv) and Tennessee/New York, suggesting a hybrid or multi-location setup unlikely optimized for EOR-friendly international hires.
recent_news: Feb 5, 2026: Briya appointed Brian Creighton as Executive Director of Client Strategy to accelerate U.S. partnerships and drive adoption of its AIRE platform, representing the company at the SCOPE Summit in Orlando.
Feb 16, 2026: Briya highlighted its AI and privacy-preserving data infrastructure for biopharma R&D (via TipRanks), signaling continued enterprise BD push.
Dec 2025: Briya announced availability in the Epic Connection Hub, expanding its integration footprint within major hospital EHR ecosystems.
research.growth_signal: Headcount grew from ~34 (Sept 2022) to 61 (May 2026), though year-over-year growth is slightly negative at -7.6%; total disclosed funding stands at ~$17M (Series A), backed by Insight Partners, Team8, and Amiti.
research.fit_for_lior: Very low fit — Briya is a clinical/epidemiological data infrastructure play (healthcare RWE, not creative AI), with open roles in data engineering and product design that skew toward health-data compliance and biomedical research tooling rather than Lior's Creative AI, Product Analyst, or Vibe Coder threads.
